Praveen
Sharma

I've spent 5.5 years building systems that don't break at 3 AM.

From architecting backends that hold 99.9% uptime, to shipping AI-powered features, to cutting freight processing time by 30% — I build full-stack apps for clients like TIAA and Epson. Google Cloud certified. Currently obsessing over LLMs and cricket analytics 🏏

atHelpshiftPune

atBetaqueIndore

atQuantiphiBengaluru

atWalkoverIndore

Side Projects
🎨Excalidraw Clone

A simple clone of Excalidraw built with React and TypeScript. I made this side project for learning purposes. The app isn't responsive, but I prioritized functionalities over responsiveness.

ReactTypeScriptCSSCypress
📋DragTrack

It's a simple Kanban board that allows you to drag and drop tasks between columns.
